title: Spicy Tender Kenyan Crustaceans Stir-fry
description: A delicious brunch-mood dish featuring tender crustaceans in a spicy sauce, perfect for adding a flavorful twist to your breakfast.
instructions: Clean and devein the crustaceans if needed. Set aside.
In a large skillet or wok, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add garlic cloves and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Deglaze the pan with chicken broth, scraping any browned bits from the bottom of the pan. Simmer to reduce slightly.
Stir in tomato sauce, red pepper flakes, and lemon juice. Adjust seasoning with salt as needed.
Add crustaceans to the skillet. Toss well until they are coated evenly with the sauce.
Cook for about 5-7 minutes or until the crustaceans are heated through and the sauce thickens slightly.
Serve hot as a side dish or on its own as a light brunch meal.
